_comment: Copy this file to integration-test-config.json and update values for your environment

lab.name: StmTestLab
lab._password_comment: Replace with your own strong password meeting Windows complexity rules (12+ chars with upper, lower, digit, and symbol). Your real integration-test-config.json is gitignored and is never committed.
lab._mode_comment: Set to 'local' for AutomatedLab on this machine, 'remote' for AutomatedLab on another server
